name: /audit-pack Decision Trail section names the EU AI Act Article 12 record-keeping satisfaction
command: mkdir -p docs/adr compliance && : > compliance/audit.log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --audit-log compliance/audit.log --adr-dir docs/adr --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'EU AI Act Art.12' out.txt && grep -q 'record.keeping' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
